name: lachesis
description: Lachesis — measures dependencies, relevance, risk, and blast radius over a committed Clotho weave snapshot (read as data; never imports clotho/).

scripts.check: node --check ingest.mjs && node --check measure.mjs && node --check scripts/test-metrics.mjs && node --check scripts/test-boundary.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && node scripts/test-metrics.mjs && node scripts/test-boundary.mjs
